_comment: Source registry for Claude Release Radar. type 'agent' = the orchestrating agent should WebFetch and summarize (the engine does not scrape narrative HTML). Structured feeds (npm/atom/markdown-changelog) are parsed deterministically. Toggle 'enabled' or add your own. See reference/sources.md.

sources.label: Claude API release notes
sources.note: Narrative HTML. Agent WebFetches and extracts entries newer than state.last_checked. If the URL 404s, WebSearch 'Anthropic API release notes'.

sources.label: Anthropic News (model & product launches)
sources.note: No stable public feed. Agent WebFetches and reports launches/announcements not yet seen.

sources.label: Claude apps release notes (web/desktop/mobile)
sources.note: Narrative HTML. If the URL 404s, WebSearch 'Claude apps release notes' or check support.claude.com release notes.

sources.label: Claude Code release notes (docs)
sources.note: Optional narrative companion to the CHANGELOG. Useful for context the raw changelog omits.

sources.label: ClaudeLog — community explainers (YouTube)
sources.note: Optional human-friendly 'explained in 3 minutes' layer for each Claude Code update. Off by default; flip enabled to true to include.
